title: Marbella Sunset Private Yacht Hire: Costs, Boats & Tips 2026
html:
For a private yacht hire sunset in Marbella, you can depart from Puerto José Banús and expect to pay between €1,200 and €4,500 for a three-hour charter, depending on the vessel. BoatHire24 connects you with verified boat owners and skippers to make this experience seamless.

How much does it cost to rent a private yacht for a sunset cruise in Marbella?

A private yacht hire sunset in Marbella ranges from €1,200 for a 12-metre motorboat to €4,500 for a superyacht like the Maiora 26m. Prices vary by vessel size, crew and amenities. Note that these rates are for a two-to-three-hour sunset window, not a full day. To compare verified listings and book a charter online, check availability through BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Marbella

Most sunset charters depart from Puerto José Banús, the glamorous marina in Nueva Andalucía. You can also launch from Puerto Deportivo de Marbella in the town centre, or from the smaller dock at Cabopino, near the dunes. For a more exclusive start, consider the private berths at the Marbella Club Hotel or the Puente Romano resort. Each offers easy access to the Mediterranean.

Which boat to rent

  1. Azimut 55, Best for a stylish couple or small group; sleeps 8 guests; from €1,800 for two hours.
  2. Sunseeker Manhattan 50, Ideal for a family or friends; accommodates 10; from €2,200 for three hours.
  3. Lagoon 46 catamaran, Perfect for stability and space; up to 12 guests; from €2,800 for three hours.
  4. Maiora 26m, For large parties or luxury seekers; 20 guests; from €4,500 for three hours. Browse this luxury yacht on BoatHire24 for full specs and skipper details.

What else does it cost?

  • Shared sunset tour on a 10-metre motorboat: from €90 per person, max 10 guests.
  • Small motorboat half-day (four hours): from €500 for a 6-metre Rib with a skipper.
  • Catamaran full-day (eight hours): from €3,500 for a Lagoon 450 with crew, including lunch.
  • Crewed yacht (three-hour sunset): from €1,200 for a 12-metre Fairline, including welcome drinks.

Season and licence requirements

For the best sunset conditions, book between June and September, when the Poniente wind (from the west) keeps skies clear and seas calm. The sun sets over the Sierra Blanca, creating a stunning backdrop.

You do not need a boating licence for a private yacht hire with a skipper in Marbella. The operator includes a professional crew and confirms any specific requirements at booking. Bareboat charters require an ICC or equivalent, but sunset cruises are crewed.

At a glance

  • Price range: €1,200, €4,500 for a 2, 3 hour sunset charter.
  • Peak months: June to September.
  • Trip length: 2, 3 hours, typically 18:00 to 21:00.
  • Capacity: 8, 20 guests depending on vessel.
  • Currency: EUR.

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I bring my own food and drink on a charter?

Many skippers allow you to bring your own provisions, though some include catering; check the specific listing on BoatHire24.

What is the best time of year for a sunset cruise in Marbella?

In 2026, the best months are June through September, when sunsets are late and the weather is warm.

Are sunset charters suitable for children?

Yes, most yachts are family-friendly, and crew ensure safety; inform the operator of ages when booking.

How far offshore do sunset cruises go?

Typically 2 to 5 nautical miles from the coast, offering views of Marbella and the Costa del Sol skyline.

Whether you are celebrating a special occasion or simply enjoying the Mediterranean evening, a private yacht hire sunset in Marbella is an unforgettable experience.
